assertions.instruction: Check if the response includes identifying or discussing new patterns from the analyzed mistakes

assertions.description: Agent mentions deriving or creating action items (step 6)
assertions.instruction: Check if the response includes deriving action items or proposing concrete fixes for identified patterns

test_cases.prompt: The retrospective skill output started with: 'Retrospective not triggered (6 days since last, threshold 7 days). No analysis performed.' What should you do?

assertions.description: Response contains the status message text
Agent stops without executing post-handler workflow steps
assertions.instruction: Check that the response only outputs the status message and stops вЂ” it must NOT begin executing retrospective workflow steps (step 5 Identify New Patterns, step 6 Derive Action Items, etc.)

test_cases.prompt: The retrospective skill output started with: 'ERROR: Cannot read retrospectives/index.json вЂ” file not found.' What should you do?

assertions.description: Response contains the error message text
Agent stops without proceeding to step 5 or any post-handler workflow
assertions.instruction: Check that the response outputs the error and stops вЂ” it must not begin executing any retrospective workflow steps (identify patterns, derive action items, etc.)
